task_context.actionable_question: Am I a procrastinator and is it costing me marks?
task_context.ai_prompt_hint: Use submission_delay_avg [FE]. Identify if late submission is systematic. Link to score.

explanation.raw_text:
Summary: It looks like you're facing some challenges with submitting your assessments on time, which is impacting your scores. Your punctuality rate is currently at 0%, indicating that you haven't submitted any assessments yet.

Insights: Lack of Submissions: You have not submitted any of your assessments, which suggests a pattern of procrastination. This is concerning as it directly affects your ability to earn marks. | Punctuality Rate: Your punctuality rate is 0%, indicating that you have not submitted any work on time. This could lead to missed opportunities for learning and improvement.

Educational implications: Improving your submission habits can significantly enhance your learning experience and overall performance.

Recommendations: high - Set specific deadlines for yourself to complete assessments before the due dates. - This can help you manage your time better and reduce the tendency to procrastinate. | medium - Reach out for support if you're struggling with the material or time management. - Getting help can provide you with strategies to stay on track and improve your engagement.

confidence.reason: The data clearly shows no submissions and a punctuality rate of 0%, indicating a strong pattern of procrastination.

required_core_outputs.description: Identify whether late submission is systematic.
Describe the observed relationship between submission delay and score.

evaluation_constraints.description: Use submission_delay_avg as the primary delay metric; do not infer procrastination from score alone.
Frame the delay-score relationship as correlational, not causal.

evaluation_requirements.safety_fairness_note: Conservative pilot default; human review is required before any not_applicable exception.
